column2: 6601 White Feather Rd, Joshua Tree, CA 92252
Joshua Tree Music Festival — Basecamp HQ
Off Highway 62, main entrance at Desert View Rd, Twentynine Palms
All crew: Lot B (gravel lot west of Stage A). No on-lot parking after 07:00. Shuttle runs every 15 min.
Portable restrooms at main parking; flush toilets at VIP tent (key card access)
Breakfast 04:30 (coffee + pastries) at HC. Lunch 13:00 south of Stage B. Dinner provided after wrap — menu TBD.

column1: ROCKBAG dust covers for all optics

column2:
1. HEAT SAFETY: All crew must drink minimum 1 bottle/hr. Medic in tent behind Stage B. Heat stroke symptoms: call 911.
2. NDA: All crew, talent, and extras have signed. No backstage photos of gear or setup.
3. DRONE FLIGHTS: Approved by park service only between 16:00–16:30. No flights over crowds. Spotter = Dave Choi (drone pilot) + PA assigned.
4. PROP FIRE: Campfire scenes require fire marshal presence. Extinguishers on each camera cart. No open flames near gear.
5. SOUND: No AC units or generators within 50ft of Stage B during interview takes.
6. WRAP: Return all rental gear to Basecamp by 20:00. Load-out starts at 18:30 sharp.
7. CELL SERVICE: Limited at desert stage. Use radio (ch 1-3) for comms. Sat phone in producer's truck.
8. LOST CHILD / PERSON: Report to Security (Yellow tent at entrance).
